problem id: abb9c33a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) AND NOT SHR(3)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  10101001 -> 01111101
  00110100 -> 10101111
  10100001 -> 01011101
  01110001 -> 00011110
  11001011 -> 10111001
  11100001 -> 01011100
  01000110 -> 00101110
  00011000 -> 10011111
  10110101 -> 10011111
  00010010 -> 11110111

query: 11000100
predicted answer: 01111100
